Title: First three-model strategy
Description: Introduced the first selection logic that ensembles three models.

Title: Blacklist SAAB from buys
Description: SAAB-B.ST excluded from buys. Its historical run was pinning it at rank 1 on ~85% of days and crowding out the rest of the ranking.

Title: Move to slot-based selection
Description: Shift from binary-direction/threshold logic to slot-based ranking.

Title: Models retrained on new data source
Description: Models retrained on data from EODHD, no more yahoo finance.

Title: Iran war - oversold
Description: Sold positions at way too low price - got hit in a low-liquidity opening auction. Should have held - fixed in next strategy update.

Title: Switch to high-conviction entry, patient exit.
Description: New more picky selection logic based on model inputs. Fixed sell prices.

Title: Fix bug that avoided some sells
Description: Pipeline bugs that changed strategy inputs, prior daily signals were running on slightly wrong inputs.
